review_text:
I went here over the weekend. The food was great, but the service was BAD. I've never seen someone act the way the waitress did that wasn't on meth....Let's hope she wasn't!

She moved so fast, worked so hard, and got nothing done.

I tried to pay at the register. He/She wouldn't let us pay. The waitress wouldn't bring us a bill either. We almost had to walk out because no one would take our money.

To the cook: The food was amazing!
Service was excellent, food was not.
Even though they were understaffed and busy; the food was very good, restaurant was clean and service was fast. Lyn did a great job with our service. Great value also for the portions. We'll be back
Excellent food and service!  Very busy but we receive chips and drinks quickly.  Food was very good-my fave right now is the sampler.

I took my daughter and her family there for dinner when they came to town. I noticed they are moving into the 21st century with square white plates and tablet ordering for the waitresses. But, the portions were smaller, the rice was dry and it just wasn’t the same. Our waitress was considerate, efficient and a good representative for their restaurant. Such a disappointment from what I remember. Moving ahead doesn't mean losing quality.
Food was served 10 min later for one of our party. Need to improve staff

Our server was nice. I realize that many places are short handed, but the nachos we ordered mostly consisted of chips and lettuce! It looked like someone scraped it off another plate onto ours. We won't go back.
Fast service,great food,great atmosphere!

The wait was not long, but after getting my plate of nachos, perhaps I could have waited. 0late looked like they tossed a handful of chips on a plate, then topped it with the fixings from a previous order that fell on the floor. The plate was thicker than the pile of so called nachos on the plate.

If I was a rabbit, perhaps I could have tolerated the mostly lettuce they served. But alas, I am not a rabbit and would have appreciated more than the token amount of beef they served.
So good, i didnt know i ate my entire chimichanga meal in under 10 mins... Num numms ladys and gents
Excellent food and service.
Use to be better
Good food and fast service
Short staffed but friendly and apologetic.  Super delicious...
Decent food, but why the HARD rock playing so loud in a Mexican restaurant?
Great food
Soon after eating the entire house was sick with vomiting and diarrhea.  I thought I was going to die..I was looking forward to eating local and supporting local. Very sad
They are always busy but do the best they can to give a good experience.
Awesome food and even better staff. Although they were short handed,  our food and service was excellent
Amazing food at this location!!!
It was good. Got our food surprisingly fast. I will return.
Strawberry margarita and Taco Tuesday here today was much needed! Food and drinks were great.
Even short staffed, they treated us super! Awesome food and fresh coffee
Great food service was also great. Food was a reasonable price.
Great service and food.
I love the small town restaurant. Good service and such good food!! Jerry and Kristen the bomb! Definitely recommend!!
Food was great
Great Mexican food n service
Awesome servers here!
Food was great.
I had a new dish that was fajita filling over rice with cheese dip. It rocked. Got a Jack and Coke and they know how to make drinks.
super friendly 💟 …
Wonderful homemade Mexican foods
Very surprised by this little spot. Really great food, didn’t miss a thing in regard to offering the necessities of Mexican food dining. Service was great and tacos were really, really good.
Decent choice for Mexican cuisine for an area with not alot of other options. Prices are a little expensive for the quality but overall, an enjoyable experience.
Great place to eat at. I won't go to any other one's. Michigan Center gets my order right others ones can't seem to get it together
Yep, never going back. Food was horrible.  Service was ok. Queso cheese was running as all hell. Food was horrible tasting. Use to love los tres. Not any more, they went down hill. 🙁
Great food and service

I haven't actually haven't tried everything on the menu but everything I have tried was excellent. There are so many good things but if I have to name one it's the chili relleno. Usually I get it with a combination meal, so good.
Food was good service was great excellent place to eat I highly recommend it
Great food. The patio is perfect, it's shaded in the evening so it's not crazy hot.
Good food, had the chicken nachos. Very good I'll have it again.
Food was good, and the beer was the right price.

I use to eat here a lot. the last three times I have been there the order has been either wrong or we ended up waiting a hour. None of this has happened during busy times. I feel bad for the serving staff because it seems the fault happens in the kitchen. I now just drive the extra 10 minutes to go the los tres over by the crossing mall.
Food was good. I must give credit to the staff although short staffed they were all very nice and timely with our order.

I hate to say anything when they were a little busy, but 3 times in a row my order has been wrong there now.  The one thing that was right (since the other food was missing) had a giant hair in it.  Tried to call to just nicely have them take it off my transaction, and after being on hold 5 minutes I decided to just eat my cold, hairy, quesadilla.
friendly, thoughtful waitstaff. we always go as a family on holiday and appreciate vegan accommodations on menu.
Great Food at a Fair Price Large Portions.
Excellent food and good service

We know our order before we even come in and this time new waitress messed the whole order up and tried to Blame the cooks. I work in service and she obviously wrote her ticket down wrong. Will never come back to this one
The customer service here is awesome!!! Had lunch with my wife and tried something new. Didn't like and they insisted on making my regular. Awesome management!!
Cute restaurant. Good service.

Sub standard tex-mex and bored staff.
Sad compared to others of same chain in area.
Can't wait for Lucero's to open, they care about their food and service.
Love this place, no complaints!
Horrible experience for pickup didn’t follow any directions. Absolutely horrible taste and will never be going there again. Service is below average and don’t know how to follow directions.
Food was out fast and hot!
Worst experience ever WAITRESS DROPPED MY STRAW NEVER GAVE ME ANOTHER ON! FOOD TASTED TERRIBLE. she sat us I had to get our own menus. No refill of chips and salsa
Great service, good hot food. Clean and friendly atmosphere.
Food was great with a good value
Love the food realy good
They are friendly and got our order correct. The veggies in the fajita were not really cooked.
Awesome staff! Great food!
Really enjoyed the food, atmosphere and waitress was really attentive.
Friendly staff, great food. Always made to feel important when my family comes in! 🥰 would recommend to anyone!
The service was excellent. Good was great. Very pleasant dinner.
The food is delicious and fairly priced.
Waitstaff great
I love this place, the food is very good and the service is good. I recommend to everyone to try.
Server was rude, trying to rush us when we got our food.
Went for lunch a couple of times now and haven't been disappointed yet
Good food, great service thank you Debra.
Our chicken, quesadilla and taco salad, was bland and very hard.
The food here is insanely good.
The food was really good. Our waitress was really nice and very attentive.

Staff was very nice and speedy. The smell of dirty bleach water as soon as I walked in the door should have been my 1st reason to turn around and leave. The food was nothing special. It had very little flavor. 4 dining for lunch and all had different meals. We were just passing through this town, but I think we would never stop here again. This place needs alot of work. Prices were recently raised which I understand, but for what you get it is NOT worth it.
Not quite at the levels of the other locations I have visited,  but good if you're nearby. Short staffed as everyone is, but we got served eventually and they did their best.
The nachos are awesome. We also had margaritas. So delicious!! I will be back!
Great service, like most places it's short staffed and might take a minute more than expected but great authentic food!
Fantastic food, friendly staff
the best place to eat with the best workers we love this los tres! make it to eat here atleast 2 times a month
The food is always delicious and the staff are wonderful
Had a fun time and good food

Had to pay extra for beans when the online menu says it comes with beans. Food had no flavor, cheese wasn't even melted properly. Paid $66 for food I ended up tossing in the trash. And no beans in a Burrito! People were nice but food and online menu needs work!
Phone server is always busy can’t ever place a pick up order

Good food, good prices.

Update May 2024: Slow service, barely warm food.
The food is delicious and the service is always friendly! I will always make the drive to visit this Los Tres specifically.
Always a good time here with great food & service!  Awesome atmosphere as well!
Always great food and great service!!

Waiting line but it was Friday dinner rush. Nicely decorated,  food was good but not exceptional.
Server was nice but really didn't seem to care about her job.
So not the best but if you have a tex mex craving it's worth the stop..
Very nice. Good food and service. Always a good place to eat.
Food was awesome.  The waitress was very attentive with a beautiful smile, very welcoming. I love going there!!!

Experience last summer. Waitress was nice.  But......when my bill came, the price was different than listed on the menu. The manager said yes, the price had changed and did not honor the price printed on the menu. The waitress said she agreed, but the manager (she) said no and walked away.
Terrible experience. Go to one of the other locations
Fantastic as always! Our waitress was so polite quick and attentive.

Service was terrible! We had to put our old dishes on the table behind us so that we had room! Saw our waiter maybe 3 times. He was nice just not attentive. Didn’t seem to care. The food was terrible! My wife ended up with food poisoning from her steak fajita. She even went to her PCP because she was so sick. She got sick right after she ate, literally  so it wasn’t hard to pin where she got it from: we will never eat there again. This place use to be nice but lately and now, IT IS HORRIBLE! Save yourself the diarrhea and don’t go!
This place has plummeted in quality all around.

I've been coming here for a long time I can honestly say I have never had a bad meal here food is always fresh and delicious service is fast friendly and efficient good Charisma good atmosphere I can confidently recommend this place
Food lacked taste wasn't like it was before. Perhaps the cook at lunchtime, service was good, only one waitress and she was doing a very good job, I felt she was stressed and I could understand why
Great place to celebrate. Hard to compare when you're used to Southern California Mexican food, but it was good!
Good food with quick and courteous service. A solid standby that never disappoints.
Good Mexican food, great service.
Great food fast service loved it!

Apparently they quit serving wine other then sangria! Margaritas SUCKED! Sherri made great ones, while the manager makes them now! Food was good but place was empty on taco Tues? Seems a new manager is ruining the place and he speaks no English! So nobody to complain too especially horrible margaritas.....and no  choice of wines!!! Ooh and apparently the can't control the nats......

Our server seemed a little stressed being the only server but she never stopped smiling. Made sure our drinks were full and we had everything we needed often. The food was great and the drinks were awesome. And the cheese sauce is killer!!!

Wasn't the best this time.  Had chorizo tacos, ground beef tacos and carne asada tacos.  The chorizo and ground beef were excellent but the Carne asada ones were not good.  The beef was dry and super tough and had very little if any flavor.  Tried dipping them in soup, dousing salsa on them and even my dog didn't like the one I brought home.  Not sure if it was a bad night for Carne asada but they were not good.
Your food is delicious.

Went for lunch with a friend. We were greeted with a smile,and seated right away! Food was on point,waitress asked several times if everything was ok or if we needed drink refills. This place was very clean, you can tell the staff is on top of cleaning which is great! If I had anything to complain about it would be the menu was kinda gross cuz had food stuck to the pages .. but that didn't stop me from ordering! Meant to bring it to the waitress attention ,but got side tracked by my friend.

if i could rate this joke of a place zero stars, i totally would. stood at the door for 5 minutes before i was even greeted, and then waited another 5 minutes at the table, until i finally got up and left.
Great food and service.
My coworker and I orderd from here and got food poisoning from their chicken.

Horrible experience. We had a party of 13 and an excessive amount of things were messed up. Once we finally got our drinks (which we had to remind our server of) the water tasted like water down sprite and we had to get them replaced. Then there was a situation with the toppings on a quesadilla and it ended in one of the servers getting extremely mad and worked up. As well as one of our other party members got her food 20+ minutes after the rest of us. The cleanliness wasn’t the best either. The manager handled everything well tho, and we got free t-shirts but we will NOT be attending again.

We stopped in for dinner, the parking lot was full so we expected a great experience. The restaurant was not the cleanest. There were table rags on the floor at our table and gnats everywhere..it just kind of felt dirty. The staff mostly talked amongst them self and about other staff. Our waiter was good. He checked on us and knew the menu. However, he seemed like either he was upset or just naturally just a non personable person.
I will not go back due to the food not being great and the unfriendly, unclean atmosphere.

They left part of our order out of bag. Upon retiring home and finding this out they would not gives discount with out being in store.  Was only asking for discount on that item not whole bill. Will not return
The food is bad
Had a wonderful time the enchiladas supreme was amazing

We first walked in one was sweeping and it look like the manager just looked at us and walked around the corner. Another one did say will be right with you. our friend asked the question about the menu she goes read it!!
He asked if he could change sauces, she said no didn’t check on us till we were done she said are you full? Our friend said no that’s why I asked you about the other one. She says you could’ve changed it around . Contradicted herself, place needs to be cleaned up a bit. The vent I could see from where I was sitting by  The back door was disgusting. We have eaten there tons of times and I will not ever go back. When we arrived, there was only three tables in there it’s just sad.
Love the food! But seriously, PLEASE dust the place. Dust EVERYTHING! Fan blades, pictures on the walls EVERYTHING is covered in layers of dust. Kinda hard to turn a blind eye to ALL the dust.
Went in for lunch didn't have to wait to be seated and food came out quickly!!
Not a Mexican lover
Giddy up Service with a SMILE!! : ) Thank you Thank you Thank you!! : )

Food is delicious and the serving sizes for the price is good. Servers were awesome as well.
UPDATE: went and got our first take-out order, and the portions weren’t the same size as when you dine in. I had tried to call them when I got home to let them know one of my meals were not correct tried calling them eight times. Got nothing! The next day try to call just to let them know about the day before spoke with the manager, and she said hold on let me get the other manager, because I am new waited on the phone for 15 minutes before I hung up tried to call back and now they’re not answering! very disappointed!!!!
My wife and I  took our teenage grandson's there for the first time. They loved it.....

Most grotesque Mexican food I have ever eaten.  Ordered fajitas with steak, chicken, shrimp and special sauce.  Chicken and steak was stringy like it was cooked in a crock pot.  It was like eating roast beef, not steak.  My brother-in-law Tom puked on the way home.  Avoid this place like the plague!
Soggy, over priced for what you get, they charge you for chips they give for free it the restaurant, los tres in town way better!
Great food.  Good service from the very busy waitress.
This place is very clean...

Called in to get an order for pick up. A burrito and a fajita. Menu totaled up to $26.30, they were trying to charge me $44.50. Explained it was one burrito and one fajita. She said yes, $45.50. Well I canceled that order. I can see why their parking lot is always empty.
Consistently good food and fast service.  I can not go there without getting the white cheese sauce to go with the chips.  Super yummy.
Really great atmosphere and staff.
Regional chain of Mexican restaurants. The food at any of them is very mediocre; they are ok (just ok) in a pinch.

We always have a great time when we go to Los Tres!  The food comes out fast and is always amazing.  Jerry is usually our server and he is awesome!  Great service and very attentive.  He even knows which dishes we like to order, and our drinks.   I highly recommend the Michigan Center Los Tres.
Great service, very family friendly. Would definitely recommend.
Jerry Matthew is the reason we go there.  He takes them to a 5 star review instead of a 4.  He does not work on Mondays or Tuesdays so make sure you time it right.  Thank you Jerry!
This is by far my favorite Mexican restaurant
Great service! Excellent service! Bad mildew smell from other business next door and it comes into the restaurant.

Authentic Mexican restaurant.  The menu is large and the prices are decent. The food portions are large. Pictured is the Special Dinner. It was just about $17 and was absolutely huge!! My favorite menu item is hands down the Chile Relleno. Their Margaritas are amazing as well. Definitely recommend this restaurant.

It's hot or miss on takeout, I personally will never eat or order there again.  We ordered inside for to go, the cook had to remake the shrimp chimichamga, it was all tied up and handed to us.  Get it home it's not a shrimp one it's chicken and barely any chicken in it.  Comments were made while waiting that the cook was drunk.  When I called to let them know the order was wrong, I was told it's posted it's our responsibility to make sure to go order is correct.  Well no, we were the only ones there, cook had to make it twice the bag tied tightly.  It's the servers job to make sure the order is correct.  There was no pico, lettuce sour cream.  I took the order back up, cause I can guarantee they would not have eaten it. I don't want my money back for the meal or the generous tip given. If the cook was drunk that does explain it of course your supervisor said he's fine.  I'll go with the other servers comments.  I've had food credits before from mi center location.  I can say for certain I will never be back.
I love coming here for the Quesa Birria!!

Food was a bit of an issue today. Girlfriend got the Chipotle Enchiladas and I got the Burrito Cochinitas. Her enchiladas came out cold, lacking of chipotle sauce and pico de mango. My burrito was very small and my plate came without refried beans for some reason. Food tasted good and service was great.
It was delicious,  I forgot what the name of dish I ordered,  but it was basically 3 doubled up fried corn tortillas with a shredded seasoned pork, pickled onion and jalapenos.
I have had only the best experience here.  The quesabirria is something I crave!

I had a pleasant experience while joining friends for lunch,  our server was attentive for the most part although our food came out wrong,  it was fixed pretty quick and was delicious. Unfortunately we didn't have room for dessert but i do plan to return to try their fried ice cream!! I would definitely recommend this place and next time I'm in the area i would love to check out their desserts for sure, and maybe order my lunch/dinner to-go! Lol...

I never have any trouble at any other location but this one. My order is wrong for carry out ABSOLUTELY EVERY TIME. No matter what. Something will be wrong, whether it's incomplete, not what I ordered, etc. It's gotten to the point I just assume it won't be right. I'm currently on a run of 4 carry out orders in a row being wrong in some way. And the last order I got I believe they are all of a sudden getting refried beans from a different supplier, because they used to be good and now they taste like cat food. I'm giving up for awhile. Maybe in 6 months they'll get my order right.
Great food, friendly staff, quick service, fair prices.
When u go u have to ask for Ricardo best server there 💯
Food was great and very large portions.
Great food and excellent service.
I had chicken fajitas,  seemed overly salted.
I love this mexican restaurant. My favorite is the big burrito amino
Great food and great people. Little bit dirty but they seemed short staffed like everyone else.
Best location in the jackson area.  Fast.  Friendly.  Clean.  And only location that don't smell like a Porta potty
Service and food was great!
A little pricey.
I pick up a lot of good from here when I door dash, seems people love this location. The staff is really nice here as well
Jerry has been our server multiple times and is the reason that we continue to come back. His service is stellar and he ensures that we are taken care of each and every time we come in.
Our server (Sherry Adams)was great! She was very intentive
So nice!!! We had a great meal and great service!!!

Sherry is an awesome server!
Thanks for a great experience!!
Great service!
Sherry A. is the best. Attentive & friendly.

Sherry greeted us upon walking in and attended to our needs promptly. My husband liked the burrito amigo. I had the queso fundido and didn't care for it. It didn't have any queso in it and the chorizo didn't have any flavor. It just tasted like Additionally, I think it is just made different here than what I've had other places in the past. I've been here before and enjoyed it!
We’re regulars at this point. Always good food and good atmosphere.
Sherry was very attentive and the food was delivered promptly and tasted delicious!
Great food and service
Great staff and good food!
Ordered two burritos to go brought them home as I live five minutes from there. They were cold and not that great of flavor.
We had lunch today with Server Sherry Adams at the Michigan Center location- it was very quick service, she made sure our food was correct, got us fresh chips, we will be back again.
Very good
Sherry was AMAZING! We had a very large party and we extremely accommodating, friendly and prompt. The service was great, the food was delicious and it was a very nice experience!
Our server was AMAZING!
Sherry rocked it! Our table of 19 was cared for and taken great care of. Efficient, kind, caring and detail oriented!
Very good food
Excellent chicken fajitas and ground beef taco salad

First time here and the food was delicious! Plenty of parking and seating. The service was fast and friendly. The food came out hot and fresh. No complaints or issues. Highly recommend checking this place out!
Just another Americanized Mexican restaurant
Service was great food was even better!! Definitely coming back! I got the fajita taco salad 100/10 recommend!
Your service is good atmosphere is good but when it comes to my wine, it’s not very good. You have Chardonnay and Pinot Grigio on your menu and you are always out of it.
Cat was fantastic,  great waitress with a wonderful sense of humor!! Definitely will be back@
Great food, Great service.
We appreciate Michigan Center Los Tres Amigos!
Great food and clean!
Sherry was a amazing server.  Very polite and accommodating thank you Los tres..
Stopped in for a quick lunch- glad I did! Clean, friendly atmosphere and the enchiladas were amazing!
Food was great and service was very quick!
Delicious and good service
Fast, friendly service. Always!
Quick service, decent food!
The food is so good and the service is always speedy!
Food is ok.  Atmosphere is ok. Lunch portion Chimichanga was perfect. Chips and salsa are always a hit!
Jerry is the best! Food is always the best!!
Jerry Young is the best!
Great time with friends
Shanda was awesome as usual!!!!!
Great food, wonderful service!
Food is always consistently very good! Service is fabulous. Jerry is the best!
Food and service always good.
amazing food, music, and staff!
Karrie, Jerry and Sherry are all amazing! They are all outgoing and personable. Always top notch service!
Always so welcoming and always enjoy the food.
We love coming into Michigan Center Sherry is always a great hostess
Always love going to the Michigan center one the food is always on point in great tasting
Sherry did great
Sherry is the best super nice and makes sure you have everything at all times!
Sherry is the best server that this restaurant has ever had. We love her .
Always delicious, and the service is excellent
Good food
Everything was great!
The staff is very inviting and the food is good. Good service and there very quick!
Sherry Adam’s has been the Best!
Friendly staff, food comes out hot and fast. Best los tres in town

Great food
Great service!

A True Gem in Michigan Center – We Always Leave Happy!
Los Tres Amigos in Michigan Center has become our absolute favorite spot for authentic Mexican food and warm hospitality. From the moment you walk in, the vibrant atmosphere and friendly smiles make you feel right at home.
Our favorite waitress, Sherry Adams, is simply the best! She always greets us with genuine warmth, remembers our usual orders, and takes such excellent care of us—checking in just the right amount without ever rushing us. Sherry truly makes every visit feel like coming home to family.
The food is outstanding and consistently delicious. The Tacos Locos are a standout—perfectly seasoned with that incredible roasted spring onion garnish that adds such a fresh, flavorful touch. For special occasions, I love treating myself to the Fajitas Amigos or the Fajipiña; the sizzling platters are loaded with tender meats, fresh veggies, and all the fixings, served with generous portions that never disappoint. My wife raves about their generous margaritas—always perfectly mixed, refreshing, and just the right size for enjoying without worry.
Everything is fresh, flavorful, and made with care, and the portions are so hearty we often have leftovers for the next day. If you're looking for great Mexican food with even better service in the Jackson area, this is the place! Thank you to Sherry and the whole team—we'll be back soon!
Fast service and kept checking in often!
Way overpriced for bad quality Midwest mexican.  I'd rather eat taco bell for these prices
Our waitress didnt seem to want to wait on is
Went for dinner. Food was excellent and our waitress was wonderful. Very friendly and made sure we had everything we needed. 10/10 will be back again!

This is the second time ordering takeout from this location and both times the same issue…the consommé. The first time they forgot it completely and this time it was completely smashed and the liquid was everywhere in the bag.

To whoever packages up to-go orders…you do NOT put the liquid consommé on the bottom of the stack of items when the stack includes heavy rice and heavy refried beans. You put the heaviest item on bottom otherwise you end up with this issue. This is basic packing common sense.

The consommé is what makes or breaks the quesabirra taco order so when that gets ruined…the whole dish is ruined. The tacos taste fine without it but when you want quesabirria tacos you want that delicious consommé. It’s why you order quesabirria tacos versus just tacos.

Unfortunately the last two times we ate at this restaurant my family and I got super sick. I actually had to go to the hospital for one of them. We will never eat here again. I don’t know what is different the last two months but before that we never had any problems.
The tacos were pretty good, but the manager makes them so much better
Best los tres in Jackson!!!
Great service
Waitress Mackenzye is a wonderful waitress.
Excellent food and service.  Even though someone called in we were surprised we had such good service, thanks to Sherry again.
The waitress was very friendly and attentives.
Never got a bad meal great service go for the fajitas
Great 10/19
Great food and quick, attentive service by Sherry!
I love everything about this place and always have great experiences and love seeing familiar wait staff that consistently offer great service.
Amanda M. Did a great job and was very kind to my sister and I!
Sherry was awesome, fast and accommodating. The food was delicious. Will definitely come back again. I work around jackson and this is my new favorite.
Excellent
A staple in out date night. Los Tes never fails us. Great food, great atmosphere and Amanda is a wonderful server. Ask for her.
Sherry was an awesome server!!
Macenzye was our server, great experience and food was excellent
They always take care of you and make you feel like it's truly a night of your own here. Always full and always happy when I leave here. Sherry takes great care of everyone she serves!
Sherry was our server, she was great.. got us our food right away, kept our drinks full, very pleasant, kind and helpful
Sherry has been our sever for years. She welcomes us with a smile every time. She has an impressive ability to remember our regular orders and treats us very well.
Great place! Sherry is amazing
Sherry is a great server!
Sherry was pleasant and very attentive! Great service!
Sherry and Jerry are fabulous servers and make our visits remarkable. Excellent food and service. They exceeded my expectations. Absolutely one of our all time favorite restaurants.
Food is great. Always great service. We love Kari shes the best.
Amazing service!!!!
Sherry was a excellent server!
Sherry was our server and she was wonderful
Friendly atmosphere, good queso and great service. Jerry always takes great care of us when we visit.
Kerry is the best!! Friendly and a great server/bartender...makes the best drinks and great customer service
I luv the staff here especially Jerry he always goes above and beyond for me

Was passing through the area and decided to try because it had 4.1 stars.
The food here is not good. There were 3 of us and meals were edible but too salty and not flavorful.
There was 1 server working on a Sunday, she was friendly and doing her best
